Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant Default Under Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant Default Under Settlement Agreement

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for entering judgment pursuant to defendant's default under settlement and release agreement" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer: W. Trupek, Not reported (302/RBU)
